problem_solved: EMS agencies, fire departments, and hospitals struggle with disconnected documentation systems, making it difficult to share patient data, ensure compliance, and measure clinical outcomes across the care continuum
solution_description: Comprehensive software platform for EMS, Fire, Hospital, and Government including next-generation ePCR, dispatch technology, fire management software, hospital data integration, and patient registry solutions. Auto-generated narrative with AI assists documentation quality and billing accuracy
traction_signals: Integration with NERIS for fire reporting
notes: End-to-end platform for emergency services documentation. Strong hospital integration for real-time care coordination. Purpose-built by and for emergency responders. High Varden fit for EMS documentation infrastructure.
